ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present with proper structure
All 9 rules have proper severity and enforcement labels in correct format
Rule count of 9 is within the 5-9 bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples with clear violations and corrections
Related section clearly defines boundaries with Architecture, Security, and Observability agents
Enforcement tools are specifically named (TypeScript Compiler, ESLint with specific rule names)
YAML metadata includes version 1.0 and last_updated 2026-04-09
Checklist has exactly 9 items matching the 9 rules in correct order
Tool Integration table provides comprehensive mapping of rules to enforcement mechanisms
